raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "St. Rose Hospital is the only emergency room and labor and delivery facility in Hayward and southern Alameda County.",
    "St. Rose Hospital had more than 28,000 Emergency Room visits last year.",
    "If St. Rose Hospital closes, patients will have to drive as much as 40 miles during a medical emergency.",
    "St. Rose Hospital serves mostly low-income patient populations.",
    "In 2023, St. Rose Hospital treated more than 40,000 patients, with over 70% of those relying on Medi-Cal.",
    "St. Rose Hospital operates 171 acute care beds and employs more than 800 local residents.",
    "Assembly Bill 2271 would provide financial support to forgive $17.65 million in debt owed by St. Rose Hospital to the state."
  ]
}
```
